waveN6.agent: Wave N6 — Demo B broadcast (Real-Time FX Swap Pool Using Gateway)

newGatewayPool.note: Pool initialized with TGH as the v4 hook (different pool than M4's FxSwapHook pool 0xd5e4a30d…). NO LIQUIDITY yet — relies on TGH.beforeSwap returning BeforeSwapDelta(0, -amountReceived) to supply USDC output. Production demo should seed LP.

waveN6.differentiator: Real-Time FX Swap Pool Using Gateway: TGH.beforeSwap pulls Circle Gateway USDC inline (gatewayMint + USDC.transfer to PoolManager + settle) inside a single tx, returning BeforeSwapDelta(0, -amountReceived) — no CCTP attestation polling. Events GatewayHubMintAttested + GatewayHubLiquidityReceived + GatewayRoutedSwap all emit in the one tx.

deprecated.reason: V1 hub+hook+spoke shipped 2026-05-15 with no relay surface (only HUB could call hook). Stage 6 (this session) adds relayToRemoteHub + relayMintFromRemote + owner + relayCallers; required hub redeploy → hook redeploy (HUB immutable) → spoke re-migration.

external.FxV4RouterHarnessNote: PMM-aware exact-input v4 router (contracts/test/utils/FxV4RouterHarness.sol). Settles user input BEFORE manager.swap — required for FxSwapHook's PMM shape, which pulls the specified input out of PoolManager inside beforeSwap via inputCurrency.take(POOL_MANAGER, hook, amountIn) (FxSwapHook.sol L731). PoolSwapTest (N2a, see PoolSwapTest_deprecated below) settles AFTER manager.swap and is therefore incompatible with FxSwapHook — verified by the N3 reverted swap artefact 0xde83acb726a6e33c670b1a17f9ce54f22ab72616c063c076bc769458647a62f6. Wave N4 closes M4 Phase-D blocker M4-BLOCK-1 (router) by pinning this harness as the V4SwapRouter in defi-web-app instead.
external.PoolSwapTest_deprecatedNote: DEPRECATED for FxSwapHook PMM use. Canonical Uniswap v4 PoolSwapTest from lib/v4-core/src/test/ — settles input AFTER manager.swap, which breaks FxSwapHook.beforeSwap (see FxV4RouterHarnessNote). Left on-chain — it remains a valid periphery for v4-LP-shape pools (no PMM custom-accounting); anyone testing such pools later can still resolve this address.

gateway.rotationPlan: Owner: rotate to TimelockController / multisig. Authority on hook: rotate to FxHubMessageReceiver via EIP-1271 once Circle ships 1271 support (~mid-July 2026).
gateway.relayCallersNote: Empty until BUFX (perp/spot layer in sibling repo) lands. Whitelist via hub.setRelayCaller(bufxAddress, true).

stage6E2E.destinationCaller: 0x2931C50745334d6DFf9eC4E3106fE05b49717DF1 (Arc hook v2 — locks mint to hook only)

notes: Arc Testnet has TWO roles: (1) a spoke (FxSpoke 0x13c8... routes USDC deposits via CCTP V2 to the Fuji primary hub, captured in the `hub` block) and (2) a trading-execution hub stack (deployed 2026-05-15 — FxHubMessageReceiver + Morpho + V4 adapters + FxGatewayHook with Stage 6 relay surface). Arc's hub is NEVER a user-deposit destination; it receives USDC liquidity from Fuji via FxGatewayHook (Circle Gateway, hub-callable only) for FX/perp execution. USDC is native 18-dec gas; the 0x3600...0000 address is the 6-dec ERC-20 form CCTP V2 + Gateway use. EURC is the real Circle-deployed token on Arc. Stage 6 relayMintFromRemote verified live 2026-05-15.

fuji.purpose: Borrow / lend / supply liquidity on the Fuji-side Morpho markets. Money-market substrate.

arc.purpose: High-frequency FX trading + perp execution on Arc. Also runs Morpho markets (borrow/lend works here too).

phaseA_tghAdmin.note: TelaranaGatewayHubHook post-deploy admin. EXECUTOR_ROLE was already granted to keeper at construction (initialAdmin); only setGatewayRoute + setGatewayContextProofMode needed.

grantExecutorRole.note: Already granted at construction (initialAdmin gets DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE + OPERATIONS_ROLE + EXECUTOR_ROLE). Verified hasRole returns true.

phaseB_v4PoolInit.note: Uniswap v4 PoolManager.initialize for USDC/EURC corridor with FxSwapHook attached.

phaseC_liquiditySeed.note: FxSwapHook.deposit(amount0, amount1) — owner-gated first deposit. Hook uses Morpho rehypothecation by default (hotReservePct=2000=20%) but Morpho markets for USDC/EURC are not yet wired to this hook, so we set hotReservePct=10000 (100% hot, no Morpho).

phaseD_demoBroadcasts.note: Phase D (live CCTP + Gateway demo broadcasts) is BLOCKED on two unmet prerequisites:
phaseD_demoBroadcasts.cctpDemoBlocker: V4_SWAP_TEST_ROUTER not deployed on Arc Testnet (Wave M3 router pin has not landed). PoolManager.unlock re-enters IUnlockCallback on msg.sender; an EOA cannot satisfy this contract interface. The L4 demo script (defi-web-app/scripts/v4-swap-pool-demo-cctp.ts) is broadcast-ready end-to-end up to the unlock step, but the unlock leg will status=blocked without a deployed v4 router contract.
phaseD_demoBroadcasts.gatewayDemoBlocker: No Circle Gateway attestation available. V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_ATTESTATION + V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_SIGNATURE env vars are not set; getting a real attestation requires (a) operator deposits USDC into Gateway Wallet on Fuji, (b) signs a BurnIntent, (c) POSTs to https://gateway-api-testnet.circle.com/v1/burnIntents to fetch attestation + signature. The keeper-spot service that would run this loop is not running yet.
phaseD_demoBroadcasts.fxSwapHookLiveSwapBlocker: FxOracle.getMid for USDC/EURC reverts StalePrice() (0x19abf40e). Live swap path needs a fresh Pyth price update inside the same tx (FxOracle.getMidWithUpdatePyth) OR a pre-broadcast cron that refreshes the on-chain feed. The deployed pool + seeded liquidity are otherwise ready; a swap through PoolManager.unlock would revert in beforeSwap before consuming reserves.

gasConsumed.consumed: 1013035791757000000 wei (~1.01 USDC across Phase A + B + C broadcasts)
